data.title: EXCLUSIVE: SKYX Platforms Partners with Wayfair to Launch Smart Plug-and-Play Home Products
data.description: SKYX Platforms Corp (NASDAQ: SKYX) collaborates with Wayfair Inc (NYSE: W) to offer advanced and smart plug-and-play products on their website.

data.title: How Cannabis Companies Can Thrive: 'Cash Capital Is Tough To Find,' But Partnerships Hold The Key
data.description: Candid look at M&A challenges and opportunities in cannabis industry, as discussed by Tony Schor at Benzinga conference. Revenue focus and partnerships key for success.

data.title: FDA Puts Speed Breaker On Novavax's COVID/Flu Combo Shot Trial On Concerns Related To Damaged Nerves
data.description: Novavax stock dips as the FDA pauses its COVID-19-influenza vaccine trials following a serious adverse event.

data.title: Dogecoin Rockets Up 10%, Shiba Inu Spikes 5%: What Is Going On?
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) are surging, with the former benefitting from social media chatter about Elon Musk

data.title: Logistics Real Estate Company Prologis' Q3 Earnings: FFO Beats, Revenue Misses, Revises FY24 Guidance
data.description: Prologis, Inc. reported Q3 results with revenue miss, higher core FFO and revised net earnings guidance, and favorable demand outlook.
